context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Default resting state of the main character Echo
context.screen_position: Center of screen at x=64, y=60, standing on perch at y=80
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when Echo is not performing any specific action, serves as the baseline animation loop

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel bird in frontal view with distinctive crest, round body, visible cheek patches
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1: eyes open, Frame 2: eyes open with subtle body shift, Frame 3: eyes closed (blink), Frame 4: eyes open returning to Frame 1

visual_specification.details: Crest in normal position (not raised), cheek patch always visible as #FF004D circle 4x4px, eyes 2x2px each, tail feathers visible extending downward 8px, feet gripping perch 2px wide each

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states share same base body proportions and color palette
relationships.differences_from: echo_sleeping (eyes always closed), echo_happy (crest raised), echo_eating (head lowered)

explicit_negations: No death animation or dying state
No color variations or alternate skins
No movement across screen (position fixed on perch)
No smooth interpolation between frames (hard cuts only)
No gradients or shading beyond base colors
